name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Smear Campaign
body:
A Smear Campaign No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [ A Smear Campaign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-j/)
I've had races over the years where my opponents and their left-wing Washington allies have attempted to distort my record and mislead voters. After all, this is politics, and as they say, "politics ain't beanbag." Another quote I remember hearing was "politics is a contact sport." I googled that phrase to see who said it, and it was me! No kidding. Try googling it. I thought I had heard it from someone else, but what the heck. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [ Our Next Ad](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-d/)
First, an admission. When I watch TV (which is rare these days since I'm in a pretty challenging re-election race this time) I rarely watch commercials. I flip to another station to see what's on, and if there's an ad there, I'll flip to a different station. Drives my wife crazy, so we typically watch stuff on different TV's when I'm in town. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [PolitiFact is Anything But](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-u/)
President Obama famously mislead the public when he said, referring to ObamaCare," If you like your health insurance, you can keep your health insurance." PolitiFact on six different occasions determined that THIS STATEMENT WAS TRUE! When, over time, it became apparent to virtually everyone that this statement was NOT true, PolitiFact reversed its opinion, and went so far as to declare that Obama's statement was "the lie of the year" in 2013! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-n/)
As I've mentioned in previous blog posts, one of Congressional Republicans' greatest challenges this election cycle is historical. And that's that when one party wins the presidency, the other party almost always picks up seats in the next election. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-p/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [If the Democrats Win - Get Ready for Impeachment](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-m/)
Democrats, for the most part, hate Donald Trump. There are, of course, a few exceptions. And there are a few Republicans, and a fair number of Independents, who don't care for him either. But most Democrats - they think he's gotta go. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-c/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-q/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-a/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkldke-kujkulhluu-v/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

name: Mike Braun
subject: BREAKING: Democrats working to impeach Judge Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjklddit-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter **When I decided to run for Senate, I told you I was tired of seeing politicians in Washington like Joe Donnelly play politics with our country’s future.** Career politicians like him only care about one thing - staying in office. They say and do whatever their pollsters and consultants tell them is most popular at that moment. [**Joe has proven this time and time again during his time in D.C. and this week has been no different.**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjklddit-kujulhlke-j/) First, he played politics instead of genuinely reviewing and considering Judge Kavanaugh. He said his disapproval was because there wouldn't be an FBI investigation. Then after the investigation, he did what he does best - made up a new excuse to oppose President Trump’s nominee.
# [What Else Do These Two Have Cooked Up?](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjklddit-kujulhlke-t/)
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjklddit-kujulhlke-i/) **But if that wasn’t enough to prove his political gamesmanship, now it’s possible he’s moving to impeach Justice Kavanaugh.** As incredibly desperate as it is, we shouldn’t be surprised. Joe sees the writing on the wall, and he's relying on millions of dollars from out-of-state groups to keep his aspirations alive. If he doesn’t play along, he loses the funding. **This is what’s wrong with politics today. It shouldn’t be about holding a seat or making a decision based on campaign contributions.** Our leaders should make their decisions based on what's best for Hoosiers, not on getting a campaign check. I’m sick of politicians like Joe who think his seat is more important than looking out for Hoosiers. If you feel the same way, I’m going to need your help. [**Donate to our campaign today and let’s put an end to Joe’s games for good.**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjklddit-kujulhlke-d/) We’re less than 30 days out now. Let’s finish strong. Thank you for your support, Mike Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjklddit-kujulhlke-h/) |
---|---|---

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump Signs Bills Banning Pharmacy ‘Gag Clauses’
body:
| |
---
#
# **_President Trump Signs Bills Banning Pharmacy ‘Gag Clauses’_**
#
“President Trump has signed two bills into law to block insurers from enforcing ‘gag clauses’ that forbid pharmacies from telling customers about how they can pay less for drugs,” Kimberly Leonard reports in the _Washington Examiner_. “The Patient Right to Know Drug Prices Act and the Know the Lowest Price Act are intended to help patients find out whether a prescription would cost less if they were to pay for it out of pocket rather than through their health plans.” Americans deserve to know the lowest prices available at their pharmacies—“and now that is what they are getting,” President Trump said. [**Click here to read more**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/healthcare/trump-signs-bills-banning-pharmacy-gag-clauses) “The president has officially ordered federal assistance for the state of Georgia post-Tropical Storm Michael,” [**WRDW of Atlanta**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.wrdw.com/content/news/Deal-declares-state-of-emergency-ahead-of-Hurricane-Michael-496229321.html) reports. President Trump approved an emergency declaration for Georgia that gives FEMA and the Department of Homeland Security wider latitude and access to resources to assist in local recovery efforts. The President signed a similar order for Florida earlier this week. “America’s manufacturing and defense industrial base – vital to ensuring our national security – is under significant threat at a time when the military capabilities of China, Russia, and our other strategic competitors are growing,” [**White House Director of Trade and Industrial Policy Peter Navarro**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/team-trump-protecting-americas-vital-manufacturing-defense-industrial-base-big-risks/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) writes in Fox News. “Fortunately, President Trump has long recognized that to be strong and secure our nation must be able to rely on U.S. companies to manufacture products needed for our national defense.” In [**_TMA News_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://tmanews.com/2018/10/cortes-usmca-scores-a-better-deal-for-american-workers/), Steve Cortes writes that the newly negotiated United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement on trade is a win for American workers. “For years, Donald Trump railed against the failed politicians whose bad trade deals stole jobs from American workers. Now the President is parlaying that tough talk into real action.” In the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/trump-is-right-theres-no-possible-way-we-can-afford-medicare-for-all), health policy expert Sally Pipes writes that President Trump’s assessment of Democrats’ single-payer proposal is spot on. “According to him, if Democrats succeed in implementing their single-payer proposal, ‘costs will spiral out of control. Taxes will skyrocket. And Democrats will seek to slash budgets for seniors' Medicare, Social Security and Defense,’” Pipes says. “He’s absolutely right.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MDkyMzAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjA5MjMwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5MDEyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

[Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2585239/15385591/-1214481066?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWZmMTgyMi02NWNkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YJgRatafpHXZurCE07xnnwZvIESf5s7gdhlzhhRDs0=) or [donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2585240/15385592/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWZmMTgyMi02NWNkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YJgRatafpHXZurCE07xnnwZvIESf5s7gdhlzhhRDs0=).
---
Peter, **The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy**. For that reason, when I heard that [Waller County wants to make it harder for students to vote on Election Day](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2585242/15385594/710742872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWZmMTgyMi02NWNkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YJgRatafpHXZurCE07xnnwZvIESf5s7gdhlzhhRDs0=), I took action. Yesterday, on behalf of my campaign and several local leaders, **my regional field director Jacob Aronowitz delivered a letter to Waller County officials, demanding that the County reverse its decision to require additional paperwork from student voters. **He photographed the delivery to prove the letter was received. That's when things got weird. **Law enforcement officials, including sheriff's deputies, stopped Jacob from leaving the building. He said he was delivering the letter on behalf of my campaign, and an officer asked, "What party is he with?" Jacob identified me as a Democrat. Minutes later, he was arrested.** [**Support our fight against voter suppression with a donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2585244/15385596/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWZmMTgyMi02NWNkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YJgRatafpHXZurCE07xnnwZvIESf5s7gdhlzhhRDs0=) Prairie View A&M University, in Waller County, is an historically-black college with over 9,000 students. **In the last forty years, PVAMU voters have been repeatedly disenfranchised.** Local officials said students were not "residents" and thus could not vote in the county. On-campus polling locations were closed. And most recently, two weeks before the October 10 deadline to register to vote, the County announced that students would be required to submit a change of address form before voting. Because of the context of voter suppression, the PVAMU community is very suspicious of the County's decision. **The paperwork requirement is an unnecessary burden that will lead to long lines on Election Day. Some students will inevitably decide not to vote, due to frustration and delay.** And the reason why this "change of address" is required is because students registered according to previous Waller County instructions, which the County is now changing on the eve of the election. Today we will hold a press conference with student leaders and local activists to demand that the County remove all barriers to voting. clean_body: = Join our team! = or =. Peter, The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy. For that reason, when I heard that =, I took action. Yesterday, on behalf of my campaign and several local leaders, my regional field director Jacob Aronowitz delivered a letter to Waller County officials, demanding that the County reverse its decision to require additional paperwork from student voters. He photographed the delivery to prove the letter was received. That's when things got weird. Law enforcement officials, including sheriff's deputies, stopped Jacob from leaving the building. He said he was delivering the letter on behalf of my campaign, and an officer asked, "What party is he with?" Jacob identified me as a Democrat. Minutes later, he was arrested. = Prairie View A&M University, in Waller County, is an historically-black college with over 9,000 students. In the last forty years, PVAMU voters have been repeatedly disenfranchised. Local officials said students were not "residents" and thus could not vote in the county. On-campus polling locations were closed. And most recently, two weeks before the October 10 deadline to register to vote, the County announced that students would be required to submit a change of address form before voting. Because of the context of voter suppression, the PVAMU community is very suspicious of the County's decision. The paperwork requirement is an unnecessary burden that will lead to long lines on Election Day. Some students will inevitably decide not to vote, due to frustration and delay. And the reason why this "change of address" is required is because students registered according to previous Waller County instructions, which the County is now changing on the eve of the election. Today we will hold a press conference with student leaders and local activists to demand that the County remove all barriers to voting. Already, the story has been covered by the = and =. We are going to center the conversation on what is most important: protecting the right to vote. = Fighting for the people, Mike = = = = = Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701.

body:
Making sure social safety net programs like Medicaid and SNAP are funded and functioning is critical to ensuring dignity for our fellow Americans and keeping our society healthy and strong.

**Unfortunately, my Republican opponent does not share these values. News broke yesterday of him comparing welfare recipients to starving animals. **

Look - _this is out of line with our values_. And let's be clear, my opponent is backed by **hundreds of thousands of dollars** from out of state special interests and I'm relying on your help to make sure I win this race. The stakes in this race were already high, now they're even _higher_.

name: M. Kelly
subject: Need help to get our ad on the air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
I've got big news, friends. **We just launched our first TV ad of the general election - and now, we need to raise just another $2,115 (we're so close!) before 5 p.m. to keep it on the air.**
If we want to win in New Hampshire and defeat the Trump-Sununu agenda that's taking our state backward, we can't afford to fall short.
Here's the thing: I'm not taking any money from corporate special interests - but I still have to fight against the big money they're spending to defeat me.

**That's why I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to give $5 or more right now to keep our ad on the air and take back the corner office.**
**[Will you rush $5 or more right now- every dollar you can spare before 5 p.m. - to keep our ad on the air, defeat Chris Sununu and flip New Hampshire blue?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a14/d0ce7de/5031e169/9cdaf6a/3957334460/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk168-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I am ready for the job.
body:
| Peter -- In my final debate with Congresswoman Blackburn last night, I think the choice in this election became very simple. If you like Washington the way it is today, with the toxic partisanship and the lines in the sand, I’m not your guy — we’ve got somebody in Congresswoman Blackburn who has 16 years of experience with that. If you want to start getting things done and bringing some fresh air into Washington, I think that’s my record and I would be proud to represent Tennessee once again. **You’ve heard me say that I’m applying for the job. After spending months talking to voters about their ideas and concerns, and about how we can come together to get things done, I’ll say this -- I am ready for the job.** Tennessee voters have a clear choice in this election -- but dark money groups funded by the Washington Swamp are trying to muck up this race with false attacks and multimillion-dollar ad buys. We need to make sure the choice for voters in this race stays clear -- that’s why I’m personally asking: **Will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can to tune out Washington’s false attacks and keep this race focused on getting things done? body:
Vice President Mike Pence & RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel to headline the kickoff of the Right Track Results to in Indy on Saturday... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/see-vp-pence-on-saturday?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **Rally with Vice President Mike Pence!**
_**VP Pence & RNC Chairwoman McDaniel to kick-off Right Track Results Tour on Saturday!**_
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5c9ead01df&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Breaking news!**
This Saturday, **Vice President Mike Pence** and **Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel** will officially kick-off the Right Track Results Tour!
[And you're invited to attend this free event! ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a86b2dc2a5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

---
| [RSVP Now for Saturday's Rally!]( "RSVP Now for Saturday's Rally!")
---
| **Join us on Saturday at 10 a.m. at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis as Vice President Pence and Chairwoman McDaniel stand alongside Mike Braun and our Indiana Right Track Results team to rally us to victory in this November's critical midterm election. **

More details will be communicated following [your RSVP to this big event](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f3901c9cdc&e=1acd9bb3d6).

And then join us as we take the Right Track Results Tour on the road with Mike Braun, Connie Lawson, Tera Klutz and Kelly Mitchell!

**Between Saturday and Election Day, we'll be visiting ALL corners of Indiana reminding our fellow citizens that it’s the Indiana Republican Party, and our proven Republican leaders, that are delivering RESULTS all day, every day.
**
Indiana is on the RIGHT track – and America is getting BACK on the Right Track – because of Republican leadership!

Visit [RightTrackResults.com](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87c4c636cc&e=1acd9bb3d6) to RSVP for Saturday's free event with Vice President Pence and to check to see when your Right Track Results team will be in your area!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Justus?=
subject: Starting the final 30 days off strong!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends, It's hard to believe we're in the final month of the campaign before Election Day. I want to take a moment to share what Team Banks has been up to so far this month as we continue to gain momentum leading up to November 6!

On Saturday, the team started off the busy weekend by joining Congressman Banks at the Steuben County GOP breakfast where he was the guest speaker.

Later that morning we gathered at the campaign headquarters office in Fort Wayne for a yard sign blitz. Thank you to everyone who stopped by and showed support!

We had a great time walking in the Corn School Parade in LaGrange Saturday afternoon.

On Monday, Congressman Banks gave remarks at at the Unifying Our City for Life Banquet benefitting Allen County Right to Life.

In addition to keeping busy with events and meeting with voters, our campaign has also received a few big endorsements this month!

Are you looking to get involved? [Show your support for Team Banks](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=74d26b327f&e=bfe3be83a5) by signing up to volunteer or requesting a yard sign today!

Thank you for you support,

Steve Justus
Campaign Manager, Jim Banks for Congress

name: Jason Yates
subject: Guess how 2018 voter participation compares to 2014
body:
Peter,
The elections are less than one month away and many are speculating how many will show up on November 6th.
We wanted to take a look at the voter turnout from the primary midterm elections in 2014 compared to 2018.
**Using one of the answer buttons below, guess how much voter turnout increased between the 2014 primary elections and the 2018 primary elections:**

We wanted to take a look at the voter turnout from the primary midterm elections in 2014 compared to 2018. Using one of the answer buttons below, guess how much voter turnout increased between the 2014 primary elections and the 2018 primary elections: United. We Stand. subject: Indiana GOP Reports Donnelly to Senate Ethics for Illegal Use of Official Resources in Ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Donnelly Uses Taxpayer-Funded Content for Campaign Ad After Spokesman Admitted it Would be Illegal | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/ethicscomplaint?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ec24fcc8b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Pete Seat, 520-990-4067, pseat@indiana.gop **Date:** October 11, 2018
**Donnelly Uses Taxpayer-Funded Content for Campaign Ad After Spokesman
Admitted it Would be Illegal **
_Donnelly Uses Taxpayer-Funded Content for Campaign Ad After Spokesman Admitted it Would be Illegal_
**INDIANAPOLIS** \- Today, the Indiana Republican Party [filed a Senate Ethics complaint](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0e79043cf8&e=1acd9bb3d6) against Democrat Joe Donnelly for his blatant use of official taxpayer-funded resources in the creation of a political campaign ad, even after his own spokesman admitted in August it would be illegal to do so.

This week, Democrat Donnelly’s campaign began airing a TV ad prominently featuring a photo of Donnelly with Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch taken in Donnelly’s Senate office and posted on an official Senate account.

Review the full complaint [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=75fb920429&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=54c823e4f6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
[ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=52734a7773&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| When the Indiana Republican Party filed an Ethics complaint against Donnelly in August for potentially using taxpayer-funded official resources for campaign advertisements, Donnelly’s spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz admitted that doing so would be illegal:

_“The fact of the matter is that Donnelly for Indiana has no intention of using that footage in an ad -- but more importantly,**even if the campaign or any outside group wanted to use this footage, it would be illegal.** ”**-**_**Donnelly spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz**

Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer issued this statement on the new filing:

**“Democrat Joe Donnelly is so desperate to fool Hoosiers into thinking he’s a not a liberal Democrat, he’ll violate Senate ethics and break federal law to do it. Even his own spokesman admitted it’s illegal.**

**“Back in August, Democrat Donnelly’s campaign said politicizing the confirmation of a Supreme Court Justice would be a disservice to Hoosiers. Since then, Donnelly’s Democrat Party has led a three-ring circus to delay and destroy Justice Kavanaugh. Now, as Donnelly is illegally abusing taxpayer resources to politicize a Supreme Court nominee to save his job, Hoosiers can see it’s Donnelly who’s doing them a real disservice.**

**“Today, I am filing a formal complaint with the Senate Ethics Committee to investigate Senator Donnelly’s flagrant abuse of taxpayer dollars in a desperate bid to get re-elected. In the meantime, Donnelly’s campaign must immediately cease running this ad and issue a public apology to Hoosier taxpayers.”**

**BACKGROUND:**

**The recent violation follows a pattern of desperate, unethical behavior from Donnelly:**
* POLITICO reported in June the Donnelly campaign was engaging in potentially illegal coordination with Democrat-aligned Super PACs. (_[POLITICO](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=819aaa922b&e=1acd9bb3d6)_ , 06/19/2018)
* In August, Donnelly’s office posted a video with no sound of the senator meeting with Judge Brett Kavanaugh to possibly be used by Super PACs or the campaign in a breach of Senate Ethics. (_[Indiana Public Media](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b0b67aed7&e=1acd9bb3d6)_ , 08/20/2018)

**Statements from Donnelly spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz in August:**

_“This nakedly political stunt is just the latest bald-faced lie from Rep. Braun's campaign. The fact of the matter is that Donnelly for Indiana has no intention of using that footage in an ad -- but more importantly,**even if the campaign or any outside group wanted to use this footage, it would be illega** l," said Donnelly campaign spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz._

_“Rep. Braun and his campaign are**doing** **a disservice to Hoosiers by selfishly politicizing the confirmation of a Supreme Court justice** because they can't stand that Joe is dutifully doing his job while Rep. Braun complains from the sidelines." (___[Journal Gazette](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d19929483&e=1acd9bb3d6)__ _, 8/20/2018)_

clean_body: Donnelly Uses Taxpayer-Funded Content for Campaign Ad After Spokesman Admitted it Would be Illegal | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: Pete Seat, 520-990-4067, pseat@indiana.gop Date: October 11, 2018 Donnelly Uses Taxpayer-Funded Content for Campaign Ad After Spokesman Admitted it Would be Illegal Donnelly Uses Taxpayer-Funded Content for Campaign Ad After Spokesman Admitted it Would be Illegal INDIANAPOLIS \- Today, the Indiana Republican Party against Democrat Joe Donnelly for his blatant use of official taxpayer-funded resources in the creation of a political campaign ad, even after his own spokesman admitted in August it would be illegal to do so. This week, Democrat Donnelly’s campaign began airing a TV ad prominently featuring a photo of Donnelly with Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch taken in Donnelly’s Senate office and posted on an official Senate account. Review the full complaint . | | When the Indiana Republican Party filed an Ethics complaint against Donnelly in August for potentially using taxpayer-funded official resources for campaign advertisements, Donnelly’s spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz admitted that doing so would be illegal: “The fact of the matter is that Donnelly for Indiana has no intention of using that footage in an ad -- but more importantly,even if the campaign or any outside group wanted to use this footage, it would be illegal. ”-Donnelly spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer issued this statement on the new filing: “Democrat Joe Donnelly is so desperate to fool Hoosiers into thinking he’s a not a liberal Democrat, he’ll violate Senate ethics and break federal law to do it. Even his own spokesman admitted it’s illegal. “Back in August, Democrat Donnelly’s campaign said politicizing the confirmation of a Supreme Court Justice would be a disservice to Hoosiers. Since then, Donnelly’s Democrat Party has led a three-ring circus to delay and destroy Justice Kavanaugh. Now, as Donnelly is illegally abusing taxpayer resources to politicize a Supreme Court nominee to save his job, Hoosiers can see it’s Donnelly who’s doing them a real disservice. “Today, I am filing a formal complaint with the Senate Ethics Committee to investigate Senator Donnelly’s flagrant abuse of taxpayer dollars in a desperate bid to get re-elected. In the meantime, Donnelly’s campaign must immediately cease running this ad and issue a public apology to Hoosier taxpayers.” BACKGROUND: The recent violation follows a pattern of desperate, unethical behavior from Donnelly: POLITICO reported in June the Donnelly campaign was engaging in potentially illegal coordination with Democrat-aligned Super PACs. ( , 06/19/2018) In August, Donnelly’s office posted a video with no sound of the senator meeting with Judge Brett Kavanaugh to possibly be used by Super PACs or the campaign in a breach of Senate Ethics. ( , 08/20/2018) Statements from Donnelly spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz in August: “This nakedly political stunt is just the latest bald-faced lie from Rep. Braun's campaign. The fact of the matter is that Donnelly for Indiana has no intention of using that footage in an ad -- but more importantly,even if the campaign or any outside group wanted to use this footage, it would be illega l," said Donnelly campaign spokesman Will Baskin-Gerwitz. “Rep. Braun and his campaign aredoing a disservice to Hoosiers by selfishly politicizing the confirmation of a Supreme Court justice because they can't stand that Joe is dutifully doing his job while Rep. Braun complains from the sidelines." ( , 8/20/2018) | | | | | | | | | | | www.indgop.org | | | | | | | | Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. name: Kathy Manning
subject: pundits, Budd, and special interest groups
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Congressman Ted Budd is certainly worried -- he just launched his first attack ad against us.
|
---

| | Three separate sources have upgraded this race to a "Toss Up." Congressman Ted Budd is certainly worried -- he just launched his first attack ad against us. And Budd's not alone -- **two national special interest groups just launched ads against us this week.** _I've never been more convinced we're close to winning this race._ [_**We're coming up against our final Mid-Month Deadline of the election. We've got four more days to reach our $50,000 goal. Will you rush in a contribution?**_](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427967/e3b7d3/5efec916/25555685/1717974925/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181011?refcode=kme181011_m") We can do this, I'm sure of it. We've knocked on thousands of doors, made thousands of phone calls, and talked to thousands of people in this district. We've gone from way behind in the polls to up to four points ahead. Families in this district are fed up of Congressman Budd and his special interest buddies and they're ready for change. We're so close to giving it to them. [_**Help us reach this Mid-Month goal by pitching in a few dollars, please.**_](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427967/e3b7d3/5efec916/25555685/1717974925/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181011?refcode=kme181011_m") Thank you. Kathy

We launched the Final Month Fund with a simple goal: raise $300,000 in 3 days for our candidates during the final stretch before Election Day.

We're happy to announce we've raised $217,386!

But we have a lot of candidates in tough races that will be won by slim margins, so it's critical we raise the remaining $82,614.

subject: Have you read our new blog post on Indiana's brain economy?
body:
Let's differentiate Indiana as a “brain engine” ready to rev up any company that's smart enough to move here to take advantage of it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/imagineindiana/indianas-brain-economy?e=8b11e0c120)

## Indiana's Brain Economy
### Read the latest blog post from guest contributor John McDonald, CEO of Clear Object. Many of today’s technical jobs, such as cybersecurity engineers and software developers, are really more like trades than roles that require bachelor’s degrees from a university. They are something akin to the plumbers and electricians of the data economy...

subject: Only 26 days until the election

body:
|
---

| | **Today marks 26 days until the election (yes, you read that correctly: we're only 26 DAYS away from Election Day!). That's not the only thing making me nervous: We want to reach 2,600 donors by midnight tonight. Right now, we need another 811 donors.** [**Will you get your $26 contribution in before midnight?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe8d/4462dc26/7d886faf/20188fd0/4282490410/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDExYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe8d/4462dc26/7d886faf/20188fd7/4282490410/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDExYW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181011am?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181011am_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe8d/4462dc26/7d886faf/20188fd7/4282490410/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDExYW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181011am?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181011am_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe8d/4462dc26/7d886faf/20188fd0/4282490410/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDExYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181011am?refcode=sbe181011am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** I've worked for Sherrod for a long time. I've seen him fight like hell for Ohio families in the Senate. I know how disastrous it would be if he were to lose this campaign. **Trump wouldn't be coming back to Ohio AGAIN this Friday if he didn't think there was a chance Renacci could win.** And the NRSC wouldn't waste money attacking Sherrod right now if they didn't think the same. Polls are getting closer. We need to make sure we have the resources to stay ahead, protect Sherrod's record, and keep him in the Senate. [**By midnight tonight, we need to reach this goal. So today, 26 days from the election, match our $26 average online contribution.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe8d/4462dc26/7d886faf/20188fd0/4282490410/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDExYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181011am?refcode=sbe181011am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thanks for all you do, Kimberly Kimberly Padilla
Finance Director
Friends of Sherrod Brown P.S.: If you can't give $26 right now, we understand. Even if all you can give is $2.60, every little bit goes towards re-electing Sherrod! [**Give what you can. >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe8d/4462dc26/7d886faf/20188fd6/4282490410/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDExYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181011am?refcode=sbe181011am_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=2.6")

body:
http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/]
Did you know that right now polluters are dumping raw sewage into the Great Lakes?
It’s true. I recently introduced a bill that would ban wastewater treatment plants from doing this, and would give them help in getting new equipment to ensure it doesn’t happen.
It’s commonsense legislation, but without environmental defenders being elected to Congress, we don’t have a chance at passing my bill — or many others like it.
That’s why I’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 for our Environmental Action Fund by midnight on Friday. Contribute $15 or more now to help us fight for a Congress that protects our water, air, and land → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-environmental-action-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181011_1_1&amount=15&recurring=auto&refcode2=b2ea4e02-8acd-e811-af11-2818784f20f6]
Congress has a responsibility to protect our environment, especially when it comes to the health of the public.
We need your help to elect other Environmental Defenders, because our natural resources will only be protected if we take action right away.
Rush $10 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-environmental-action-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181011_1_1&&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=b2ea4e02-8acd-e811-af11-2818784f20f6] Rush $25 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-environmental-action-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181011_1_1&amount=25&recurring=true&refcode2=b2ea4e02-8acd-e811-af11-2818784f20f6] Rush $50 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-environmental-action-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181011_1_1&amount=50&recurring=true&refcode2=b2ea4e02-8acd-e811-af11-2818784f20f6] Rush $100 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-environmental-action-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181011_1_1&amount=100&recurring=true&refcode2=b2ea4e02-8acd-e811-af11-2818784f20f6] Or click here to rush another amount now! name: Leah
subject: FW: No Thanks, Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
We all have a choice to make next month. We can either support a Senator stuck in the past, too focused on opposing tax cuts and resisting.....
Friend,

We all have a choice to make next month.

We can either support a Senator stuck in the past, too focused on opposing tax cuts and resisting President Trump’s America First agenda to fight for Wisconsin...

Or we can support fresh, new leadership, with tried-and-true conservative values, ready to stand with President Trump and advocate for middle-class families across Wisconsin.

When Tammy Baldwin announced her endorsement from former President Obama, she thought she was doing herself a favor, but Wisconsinites haven’t forgotten what life was like under him.

A dangerously underfunded military, weak foreign policy, porous borders, and skyrocketing debt... Tammy Baldwin’s Obama endorsement only means she’s committed to bringing us back to his failed agenda.
[STOP TAMMY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPsftBr190zIytF_HV0I08RrCjhXT5JFqAoBDCvCBPiO5z-f2WwnrNWn6h6Ih48n2vbbVJqns6BuPmQRTwjYvMigiGq-_FlsSoPNWkw22iu__7x-Zwy7HddhwMvrUPP0zf9URz5WCGzHWvWdd_V79m5mNozqYEmqmhk56i7VPbL6VO07S_XaE_OtRI0zUmJWkIukzn-mBJQjAZAsSFCpBmesr5GfJTaKuJ-TqB2eEXVEY-Fd6pFyQdl5AEnqeY7JfZYusctMNB_mWsHwoRGwRNlzHUk3tu1igonFyT20cssZYCVrT4W5GlodvAf0II_qMUjzgbyUnPq2Z5aQu4peG9KPa66slvInqAfPfIhb5iWYy8rvvI5u8Ts0CpLu0gnV0cqoEaiN_Vr6iDcaW8cENfmM%3D)
---

What Tammy doesn’t realize is that the people of Wisconsin are relieved that President Obama is out of office. Our economy is in better shape than ever. We have more, better-paying jobs, and families have more cash in their pockets.

Let’s send a message to Tammy Baldwin. [**Wisconsinites have had enough of her liberal, Obama-era policies, and we’re going to do something about it!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPsftBr190zIytF_HV0I08RrCjhXT5JFqAoBDCvCBPiO5z-f2WwnrNWn6h6Ih48n2vbbVJqns6BuPmQRTwjYvMigiGq-_FlsSoPNWkw22iu__7x-Zwy7HddhwMvrUPP0zf9URz5WCGzHWvWdd_V79m5mNozqYEmqmhk56i7VPbL6VpmNxhgY2SoEe6QbZP_Tq8f4pmHwWkpW8gJaQy3z8f2ZDdqAoSUw0znfG_qHiCrhFWoQd46kT-A_2nkEql-UeBSgxnDvVW3Rd_d9yfkP2xxUE-cxmNPNEZNvDDHz2bFh7_YQ-3a8TBIIn7PHpqg_7t0skEUpB5vKiHvdKPbBJHAFXR_5fEXhUlXMrcgdiUzWl6k7OVub2WpMIZcDxhjcMw2ppjxaBVPtZjggfE50KqGI%3D)

Friend, I ask that you join me in getting our message across loud and clear.

[**Will you chip in $25 to stand firm against Baldwin and Obama?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPsftBr190zIytF_HV0I08Rr_cUDfo2EXqIXB9RWw9T9gAWOsm-jFwm2CE2skr6wdO_iMrs6IbcZbi5LwezJmhnjQpN-qQ9t8NF6Z5bKZXUH_LpN5K0dImF1rDCqPQT8FiyxteOzxJR2rIIsLHpnd1SdVsejz5ULE-p7Bx9HB54wk5V3nQBA2x2WvmYT84qIKfflINiJ7hf1_IjeYQk36fJOgFxaRNW5nuTDiH7VDCUVw7t6XtvdQ5t2m69s7M1qWvX4hxRTGZxbLLwNFsNa9LxQZ0HDegCXHFR5N0LKmNgt4iunyz3iKtiKjSNynfzbMfD-T2Mtz_tCYl3XgrgIa8BHDVbsrCPSOC3Xo5F_3HKUK3xNQGVBgrH2nnGz0W9yny92dwsWijCElxuaozn6QO2c_asp3ZClcDMmWXHxM8WJ0)

Wisconsin deserves MUCH better.

-Leah

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend,

If you want to know where Tammy Baldwin stands, just look at the elitists who support her.

The latest liberal big shot to endorse her is none other than President Barack Obama.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPsftBr190zIytF_HV0I08RrCjhXT5JFqAoBDCvCBPiO5z-f2WwnrNWn6h6Ih48n2vbbVJqns6BuPmQRTwjYvMigiGq-_FlsSoPNWkw22iu__7x-Zwy7HddhwMvrUPP0zf9URz5WCGzHWvWdd_V79m5mNozqYEmqmhk56i7VPbL6VHaUeZOEiwoH5D0KwxUDuu0FcilCZUtn2O3Mqu1138zIzViEsItWV01rbAcftXOtsTnhKWCy6V0bQU5YzgH9JhDfNM2BX0bR0zZNT2Gqmd2mGWEpoxb7Y1LbDFJoCtUYkiEJtMFYUqFDhXKcnw-kEtR5PD1czqO9zyO700hYvXm32A8KktzMAfCaA0oTU_2v7q63AbXfshcwtfrByYx5ql5pyunW4_OCshCAtgp2BQcQ%3D)

It’s just another reminder that Tammy Baldwin stands for radical liberals, not with Wisconsin.

Under President Obama, our taxes were high. Under President Obama, our economy failed. Under President Obama, America signed on to terrible plans like the Iran deal and trade deals that cost American jobs.

Tammy Baldwin may not remember all that, but WE DO. And no matter how many DC donors Obama brings to Tammy Baldwin, we’ve still got a fighting chance to defeat her. But only if we work together now.

[DEFEAT TAMMY: CHIP IN $25](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPsftBr190zIytF_HV0I08Rr_cUDfo2EXqIXB9RWw9T9gAWOsm-jFwm2CE2skr6wdO_iMrs6IbcZbi5LwezJmhnjQpN-qQ9t8NF6Z5bKZXUH_LpN5K0dImF1rDCqPQT8FiyxteOzxJR2rIIsLHpnd1SdVsejz5ULE-p7Bx9HB54wk5V3nQBA2x2WvmYT84qIKfZeWHkgfOEc7ZoHzS3MNlEqhGj6MC81yiIGv0T3Rzj7JVACOCJO8xClN4FrxFMUGpz1LvNFuOO0fQZkC24iuHPFcwduwWCCavGs9n50m7cKS2sA8ZH8HMpAXiqKmT4cdbn_gg9aImDrEYCcmmURhnJ5kw-_Xcx4jfZV8CZz05qSmcJBvo8DtcWqzlvNYwbQGnoC7aUtl1Qb-JfH7-dFZbYgsgJSwYY57SIoj2XgMQYER)
---

The truth is, President Obama and Tammy Baldwin want the same thing: to stop President Trump from succeeding. They want a liberal Supreme Court, they want to repeal tax reform, and some liberals are even promising to impeach our President if liberals succeed at the polls this fall.

They’re willing to do just about anything to stop us.

But friend, we’ve made so much progress these last two years, and if we fight now to send liberal obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin home, we can do _even better_ next year!

Friend, we’ve seen what Obama didn’t do for us. We know where the liberal policies of the past get us. And we know what six more years of Tammy Baldwin would mean for Wisconsin. And all I can say to that is “NO THANKS, Obama!”

I hope you will chip in today to help defeat Tammy Baldwin and fight back against Barack Obama and the liberal elites: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPsftBr190zIytF_HV0I08RrCjhXT5JFqAoBDCvCBPiO5z-f2WwnrNWn6h6Ih48n2vbbVJqns6BuPmQRTwjYvMigiGq-_FlsSoPNWkw22iu__7x-Zwy7HddhwMvrUPP0zf9URz5WCGzHWvWdd_V79m5mNozqYEmqmhk56i7VPbL6Vn6Cms2j0eaNKnGWdi56cnlSDfnSsE5nf2KX74bJlm4dLNFGg-qzrbjPQa0CTeUnnLN7-_EjfmLehFgOvy9kVehWlbgumzc0XE-2kN30ZJ4TH_K7GPiC5hqtFKuhMYCsFDz36F5zp-Ha_NA0qLcUq9Qlv5bdjGj6pMojQFlQowhleou8-e-91Kh65Wm3gKghvECI_cRTq8333LO6TPC73xWzFNmwE3MdM2msRwYAuqh4%3D)**

Thanks, friend.

Together, we can bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington.

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPoZO3fKdgQUuASt31H45zRqfRlteB6IDqlcob3KUiAPOR4QfwDwR1fmGwfgL4YnHRzmdRL4U40-yoILNo1blq7ctT7YTtVMFrhouclEmvBILoscv4kATCj4ClgDM4rhoXVTYPc5htkAlm3ZYoyolORubm-eatSdJRj_3EgqdMqzLpblvLFt7SbW5KioiTDdawMFsiKFEppPUZExcFIpkQxCcFtIBs3HOwBlmlUntOc58yw-lhPXCwX7tt67AuQq2lQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPu03s38C6zyw5rdN0HUtUIfyjpiKnPiAqXqJOYpNQ81LFPyZiTPF0BWYiRuBd3rByJMZZRRDw15v__3RY4O9WegM2SG8B5YBQNIVWko-nt0Gv3XMmzAjnfV0bgczaXc7oX2xPzS1G9laUnv0YWbEQ36vpXUz-5vvPAbueDbHWnwsYJDv-pmmzJbNyPyGNC42pC4f20DTMbbTYM4tIjpRHe3cjr4Y_hAzF-GYEObLgYEMvRI2tsb5iXugBjxeRoHDew%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=tN_JisiurMCVoKtbXOgC1xRybwGd5s3-S9dLzO0zrsf-ES7vLopv_RlLHFhl_vs4NlAONOIAqeJtubAnt9G_1KkFW2rMXZ519TFxeFFAXicRgH2uBXww6Q2Cf7NjVFgLW4kQgXM5L_e2vB8P2rdBVI-57oXovsmPcl1JQg3F7hOV-A6NAnzmFlalHmXCYuSv_bhcZ0X0yo4DRPKA1Wk3pkV3nMNKg1d0cPZvKvhdO7n2GRs6Fn_SWVaQ66Dd881W). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPk1uv8TssPYejpVkfMwsOK8PZp979Wp0vvw_ajyioNWz6RaE-nXjQK9aFnK_0kgwmh5mMXDied4f2qGWo8xf2mNsjFO6EeF9deuTrz9q9UoDMapyRb2lGAlRu9wqnSVF3yd27u2Lp7sIVCJgjxZVdCrNJi_FXFegHCoMDpc3KvpuNA4BcBucVSg98lHUKMfhwez2UxwErmQn5YVIA7xlzRrSaoi4x_fX2RO-l2zRDtugFZHlXvzQ4s1MeZW2Q9z5LJSxlEEKu9qqKZFqZRC9N1FjFIXUNN1hiBx4PcCzROM4XH4CbiJUacZDxCMmeSDsoecF31sSPaUtSdYS-KChlkIWCpH-7d1auEH1CdexRP_z) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPk1uv8TssPYejpVkfMwsOK_GloLV1LaeGd1HGJhaHzTfNzhwRvb56ik7DEfNwWI2jCaNzrOAgkyY7fEYdUTN2_DNMwRYTP27n0wUR2hJWafpg1xUkTynNbn_ldpvPu7k_X3MH8woEnno2YUS5v49p45mcrbYTjm9CRRw88q3eWOGF4mFRE0i1xqI1yBb09bqEYByq0XqGRzNwUXnftv751dUr0O16cZiRVBUArobAzA5bxijMFGjfnJ3-oXHX2bTI3MSiHpoYRAbjWe-3Ssp1N4DNmEhSmKlOr70QfrsgfDhpi7xOdKtqHaP5gcToqTWilZzuBPNysbNwL3f431w_pYvMuOWgJhnxOjW3w9SqGA8) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPoZO3fKdgQUuASt31H45zRqfRlteB6IDqlcob3KUiAPOwQATTrhTsPch7zWL1s4noR4O1KTTHf1OI2xwMk-tCkCJloaFKdg0Lxads4uv4tqpmkXR7bbUuxwuCYKsEOWUnkdyHO-N6wgwD1vvzZPq2ynOstFoUh1iK62ac3vd_nZMNTP1tELm4rm9CqqsOuMhqNNIBCm3paLx6rgTLcSUtTP5peNSCLVHnsn4aZwSjXrZQme6ZpjBzThFmdC4vyV1ag%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPu03s38C6zyw5rdN0HUtUIfyjpiKnPiAqXqJOYpNQ81LnEcO3uu50qDvBrvc4ag_DSI6sq_3uQz30AqHwMEQHCs3VKsvJqny606JADkZ5yUp_WRgW18cCtkT0_udcIGROQkkSYUwaCK5WZ5U507ndsrNiPTk8oA26aXuGqZ1wJT1WS8wQ4dYMs41uK0ZYzhGoFw11mk86KGcdBLM3F36YiF7bN4d3ktPPbepjqtO_Q0cPp5Q0R_TcL7yxJJV7r6sbw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=aac6d305b4b14f1888cb2bc8c30c5442&_e=RDGvol5VJlkIxO6OJwemPj-swgO4gmyWfryWdiPlaklVFdijMisGLkb-92q2pUXujZV7B7SxZarVUqy1AkF03a07JBYylkz4cGCrH0WUDwLcFllctOUk624FCoqAI9jgqb-gJxNKvj9YOI79NO31emn6xtzcYa5OYXoBbpVUbD49TjoJ2He3shCw2wMp0DIlS6UAdQDPO1PTRUO1ecyjn3ZICaxT26x8V5BevgNDnp6J65gVKBEjlNfy0IG-gzniJNn7-bfy3PMd-pm6TU3IHQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. clean_body: We all have a choice to make next month. We can either support a Senator stuck in the past, too focused on opposing tax cuts and resisting..... Friend, We all have a choice to make next month. We can either support a Senator stuck in the past, too focused on opposing tax cuts and resisting President Trump’s America First agenda to fight for Wisconsin... Or we can support fresh, new leadership, with tried-and-true conservative values, ready to stand with President Trump and advocate for middle-class families across Wisconsin. When Tammy Baldwin announced her endorsement from former President Obama, she thought she was doing herself a favor, but Wisconsinites haven’t forgotten what life was like under him. A dangerously underfunded military, weak foreign policy, porous borders, and skyrocketing debt... Tammy Baldwin’s Obama endorsement only means she’s committed to bringing us back to his failed agenda. What Tammy doesn’t realize is that the people of Wisconsin are relieved that President Obama is out of office. Our economy is in better shape than ever. We have more, better-paying jobs, and families have more cash in their pockets. Let’s send a message to Tammy Baldwin. Friend, I ask that you join me in getting our message across loud and clear. Wisconsin deserves MUCH better. -Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, If you want to know where Tammy Baldwin stands, just look at the elitists who support her. The latest liberal big shot to endorse her is none other than President Barack Obama. It’s just another reminder that Tammy Baldwin stands for radical liberals, not with Wisconsin. Under President Obama, our taxes were high. Under President Obama, our economy failed. Under President Obama, America signed on to terrible plans like the Iran deal and trade deals that cost American jobs. Tammy Baldwin may not remember all that, but WE DO. And no matter how many DC donors Obama brings to Tammy Baldwin, we’ve still got a fighting chance to defeat her. But only if we work together now. The truth is, President Obama and Tammy Baldwin want the same thing: to stop President Trump from succeeding. They want a liberal Supreme Court, they want to repeal tax reform, and some liberals are even promising to impeach our President if liberals succeed at the polls this fall. They’re willing to do just about anything to stop us. But friend, we’ve made so much progress these last two years, and if we fight now to send liberal obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin home, we can do even better next year! Friend, we’ve seen what Obama didn’t do for us. We know where the liberal policies of the past get us. And we know what six more years of Tammy Baldwin would mean for Wisconsin. And all I can say to that is “NO THANKS, Obama!” I hope you will chip in today to help defeat Tammy Baldwin and fight back against Barack Obama and the liberal elites: Thanks, friend. Together, we can bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Ben Jealous
subject: 27 years ago today:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This fight still matters.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37880c/7ab0e2c4/7e005dc8/34980cd9/2081819649/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/photos/when-i-was-a-kid-my-father-led-rape-awareness-marches-to-pressure-local-leaders-/10156080908574436/") Friend, In 1991, I walked into a room at Columbia University for a meeting of a new group called Black Men for Anita Hill. I was inspired to join the fight to support survivors of sexual assault by my father, who led rape awareness marches to pressure local leaders to take sexual assault seriously. In that room I met a lifelong friend -- Eric Garcetti, now the Mayor of Los Angeles. Twenty seven years ago today, Anita Hill testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee to tell her story of being sexually harassed by then-Supreme Court nominee Clarence Thomas. Twenty seven years later, almost to the week, Dr. Christine Blasey Ford testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee to tell her story about being sexually assaulted by then-Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh. We were sure things would be different than they are today. But now, both men sit on the highest court in our country. One third of the male justices on the Supreme Court are now men accused of sexual misconduct. It's easy to feel helpless when so many of those in power are men accused of sexual violence -- we can't ignore that our own president has many credible allegations against him, too. **But 27 years ago, I pledged to keep fighting. Last month, I pledged again to never give up the fight. I was proud to stand with Anita Hill, and I'm proud to stand with Dr. Ford.** It's sometimes easier to stay quiet in moments like these -- moments where you're not forced to take a side, because as a candidate for governor I didn't have a vote for or against Judge Kavanaugh. That's the side Larry Hogan took, stating simply that because he didn't have a vote to cast, he shouldn't have an opinion to share either. I know history has its eye on us, and women and men around the country are watching. They're certainly watching here in Maryland, where Judge Kavanaugh and Dr. Ford grew up. This is a culture we need to change, and we need to change it now. I know I'm committed to that, and it's why I stood up for Anita Hill in 1991 and it's why I stand with Dr. Ford now. **We all have a voice, and it's up to us to decide how to use it. I'll always use mine to fight for better.** [**Stand with me in support of Anita Hill, Dr. Ford, and all survivors of sexual assault.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37880c/7ab0e2c4/7e005dc8/34980cd9/2081819649/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/photos/when-i-was-a-kid-my-father-led-rape-awareness-marches-to-pressure-local-leaders-/10156080908574436/") Thanks, Ben
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37880c/7ab0e2c4/7e005dc8/34980cdb/2081819649/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Stopping an unstable president who is a liar
body:
[1]Bernie Sanders

Dear Sisters and Brothers,

We are in a pivotal moment in American history, and the election on
November 6 will determine, to a very significant degree, the future
direction of our country.

Do we continue with a one-party, right-wing government in Washington led
by a pathological liar with strong authoritarian tendencies? Or, do we
stand up to Trump and fight for an agenda that represent all Americans,
and not just the 1%?

That's what this election is all about.

So today, I am happy to share that I will be going out on the campaign
trail for an eight-day, nine-state tour with stops in Indiana, Michigan,
South Carolina, Iowa, Wisconsin, Arizona, Colorado, Nevada and California.

In these states, I am going to do everything I can to win support for
progressive candidates for the U.S. Senate, the U.S. House, Governor and
state legislature.

In the midterm election of 2014, the United States had the lowest voter
turnout since World War II. The result: Republicans won landslide
victories all across the country. That has got to change, and that is what
this campaign swing is all about.

Along with the candidates, I'm going to do everything I can to get working
people and young people involved in the political process and to the
polls.

I hope to see some of you at these events, but today I want to ask you to
help fund this effort to elect candidates who will lead the fight to stand
up to Donald Trump.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2824?refcode=em181011-full&t=1025&akid=196%2E150750%2EAuo7UX ]Can you make a
$3
donation to support my re-election campaign and my efforts to elect
progressive candidates all across the county? I would not ask if this were
not important. I cannot do it without your help.

It has never been more important for millions of working people and
progressives all across this country to come together, to take a stand
against authoritarianism and oligarchy. Our job is to revitalize American
democracy, end the collapse of the middle class, and to create a nation of
economic, social, racial, and environmental justice.

At a time when Republicans want to suppress the vote, we have to increase
voter turnout. At a time when Republicans continue their war against
women, we have to elect more women to local, state and federal offices,
and at a time when Trump wants to throw 32 million people off the health
care they have, we have got to guarantee health care to all as a right not
a privilege through a Medicare-for-all, single-payer program.

In this election, we must not only defeat the Trump agenda, but we must
also fight for a government that represents all of us. That’s why I am
going out on the road to support a number of great progressive candidates
before November’s election.

And I am thankful to know that we are in this fight together and the
political revolution continues.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Can you make a
$3
donation to support Bernie’s re-election campaign and his efforts to elect
progressive candidates all across the county? He cannot do it without your help.
[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2824?refcode=em181011-full-bask&t=1050&akid=196%2E150750%2EAuo7UX ]DONATE
$3

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.berniesanders.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=196%2E150750%2EAuo7UX

name: Team Walz-Flanagan
subject: Exclusive Look at our New Digital Ad
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend,

Today we released our new digital ad, _Different-Colored Lunch Ticket._ The ad centers around Peggy's experience growing up with a single mother, being on the free and reduced lunch program at school, and having Medicaid as a child with asthma -- which she credits for saving her life.

**" It taught me that we all have a struggle, even if we don't all have a champion,"** Peggy says in the ad.
_Watch the ad, like it, and share it with your friends here:_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/iENE2SmcR9CNrlLfowFVe5jgVcmuYmrBGCNanqeK1Gw=/h0DMC7-dzk7vtDbbbLPSyne04_jJaWGjIgYK9SeNY1o=)
---

Peggy is a life-long children's advocate who previously served on the Minneapolis School Board, as the executive director for the Children's Defense Fund Minnesota, and as the second Native American woman elected to the Minnesota House of Representatives.

As Peggy says in the video, **" Some politicians talk about 'those people' \-- well, I am 'those people.' And when you elect Tim Walz and me to lead our state, we'll hold the door wide open for every Minnesotan to build a better life. That's a vision for One Minnesota worth fighting for."**

26 days left until the election!

\-- Team Walz-Flanagan

**[P.S. $5 helps us reach at least 500 more people on social media with Peggy's inspiring story. Will you chip in and help us spread Peggy's powerful story? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/iENE2SmcR9CNrlLfowFVe5jgVcmuYmrBGCNanqeK1Gw=/ZhTTP56qiP7fq1PtNb27gqP-yciK4NnRX-3920pBALY=?refcode=20181011nd&amount=5)**

| ******[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iENE2SmcR9CNrlLfowFVe5jgVcmuYmrBGCNanqeK1Gw=/ZhTTP56qiP7fq1PtNb27gqP-yciK4NnRX-3920pBALY=?refcode=20181011nd&amount=10)******
---
|

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw my email earlier last week about voting early.

The day has arrived! Absentee ballots are being mailed and voting has begun across the 10th District.

As thousands of Valley voters begin to lock in their votes, I’m reminded of what an honor it is to be a part of our nation’s great electoral process.

But as voters start to cast their ballots, time is running out. The election is only 29 days away, and voters are making their decisions NOW.

I need to make sure that my message is reaching voters before they cast their ballots. That means picking up the pace. We need to make sure our ads are reaching every voter on TV, radio, and digital. We need to make sure our volunteers have the resources they need to knock on every door they can, and we don’t have any time to waste.

But friend, according to my finance team, to do all that we need to raise another $38,147 by the end of this week. I’ve asked them to set up an emergency fund to raise the money at the link below.

I don’t make this request lightly, but if we don’t act now we leave the Valley vulnerable to the Bay Area liberals’ “blue wave” - and I won’t let that happen.

-Jeff

It’s hard to believe that we’re already here. In just 7 days, Valley voters will begin casting their ballots in this year’s general election.

Once again, we have the chance to prove that Valley values are stronger than the liberal elitists from the Bay Area.

But, friend, my opponent has the help of Nancy Pelosi and her Bay Area liberal donors. They’re throwing everything they’ve got into making the Valley a part of their so-called “Blue Wave.”

We can’t let that happen.

But as voters start to cast their ballots, time is running out. The election is only 29 days away, and voters are making their decisions NOW. I need to make sure that my message is reaching voters before they cast their ballots. That means picking up the pace. We need to make sure our ads are reaching every voter on TV, radio, and digital. We need to make sure our volunteers have the resources they need to knock on every door they can, and we don’t have any time to waste. But friend, according to my finance team, to do all that we need to raise another $38,147 by the end of this week. I’ve asked them to set up an emergency fund to raise the money at the link below. I don’t make this request lightly, but if we don’t act now we leave the Valley vulnerable to the Bay Area liberals’ “blue wave” - and I won’t let that happen. I hope you’ll join me today to defend our home. -Jeff \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, In one week, voting will begin throughout California ahead of this year’s general election. It’s hard to believe that we’re already here. In just 7 days, Valley voters will begin casting their ballots in this year’s general election. Once again, we have the chance to prove that Valley values are stronger than the liberal elitists from the Bay Area. But, friend, my opponent has the help of Nancy Pelosi and her Bay Area liberal donors. They’re throwing everything they’ve got into making the Valley a part of their so-called “Blue Wave.” We can’t let that happen. We have 7 days before voters start locking in their votes, which means we have to act NOW. We have to spread our message before they fill out their ballots. I can’t thank you enough, Friend. Jeff Paid for by Denham for Congress

subject: meet Joe, the face of our latest ad

body:

| | Peter, I want to introduce you to a special member of Team Spanberger. Joe McElroy is a proud U.S. Army veteran, a Republican -- and the face of [**our latest television advertisement**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DgFYpJK5J_ASHG_P5PisBQREycxKSlXh5ytKRD3-lFc=/QV2MsSG_xq0tYr_V3fq4dVokX9oJHlCHyMPUZ0iCijk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.11_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) here in VA-7. In the spot, Joe shares his story and explains why he is supporting Abigail this fall. [**I hope you can take a minute to watch, and then make a grassroots donation so we can share his perspective with voters across our district:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DgFYpJK5J_ASHG_P5PisBQREycxKSlXh5ytKRD3-lFc=/QV2MsSG_xq0tYr_V3fq4dVokX9oJHlCHyMPUZ0iCijk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.11_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DgFYpJK5J_ASHG_P5PisBQREycxKSlXh5ytKRD3-lFc=/QV2MsSG_xq0tYr_V3fq4dVokX9oJHlCHyMPUZ0iCijk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.11_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) As Joe says in the ad, Peter, Abigail has a history of putting our country first, both as an officer at CIA and in federal law enforcement. We're proud to be building a grassroots movement for positive change here in VA-7 -- **one that is bringing Central Virginians of all political persuasions together.** [**I hope you will take a minute to hear from Joe, and then make a donation to our campaign so we can continue persuading voters to join our team.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DgFYpJK5J_ASHG_P5PisBQREycxKSlXh5ytKRD3-lFc=/QV2MsSG_xq0tYr_V3fq4dVokX9oJHlCHyMPUZ0iCijk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.11_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Justin Jones _Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DgFYpJK5J_ASHG_P5PisBQREycxKSlXh5ytKRD3-lFc=/QV2MsSG_xq0tYr_V3fq4dVokX9oJHlCHyMPUZ0iCijk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.11_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DgFYpJK5J_ASHG_P5PisBQREycxKSlXh5ytKRD3-lFc=/4hk0fZEpAOYTggD40f9iPj08hnxA6EHTVPcm0J3w4uM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. name: Joe Biden
subject: I am endorsing Steve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
From the desk of the 47th VP of the United States:
---
Friend,

I love visiting Nevada. The people, the energy, the culture -- there are few other states quite like it. And there are very few candidates who reflect this state's values like Steve. That is why I am proud to endorse Steve Sisolak for Governor.

I am proud to support Steve because he's not only right on the issues, but he's also my kind of candidate. He comes from a blue-collar background, knows the value of hard work, and is all about standing up for families. That's how I know he'll put the interests of working Nevadans first.

**[Will you please consider supporting my friend Steve with a contribution to his campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/zFSmrcXW4ROP0balE1VyLLy9EM3zimm_66eBXctslcc=/15lrA3dJDHklqzZIu7XtnJ7O7q6tN_N_YOOfREvPU84=?gpsid=37_57_4292&refcode=em18_181010_VPOTUS_L1_fnd_gq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_181010_VPOTUS_L1_fnd_gq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Steve knows the challenges that come with trying to make payroll and with raising a family as a single dad. Steve's experience and vision make him the best choice for the Silver State. He will focus on improving public education, protecting Medicaid expansion, and creating good jobs across the state. I hope Nevadans will join me in supporting him on Election Day.

**[Please consider making a contribution to Steve today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/zFSmrcXW4ROP0balE1VyLLy9EM3zimm_66eBXctslcc=/15lrA3dJDHklqzZIu7XtnJ7O7q6tN_N_YOOfREvPU84=?gpsid=37_57_4292&refcode=em18_181010_VPOTUS_L2_fnd_gq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_181010_VPOTUS_L2_fnd_gq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

---
Joe Biden

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/zFSmrcXW4ROP0balE1VyLLy9EM3zimm_66eBXctslcc=/15lrA3dJDHklqzZIu7XtnJ7O7q6tN_N_YOOfREvPU84=?gpsid=37_57_4292&refcode=em18_181010_VPOTUS_B1_fnd_gq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_181010_VPOTUS_B1_fnd_gq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK

Las Vegas NV 89125 United States
