name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: A busy day at the White House
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 11, 2018
## President Trump’s actions on Hurricane Michael
##
##
**As the remnants of Hurricane Michael** move across the Carolinas and Virginia, President Donald J. Trump’s focus remains on Federal support for local and state responders across the Southeastern United States. **In the past 24 hours** , the President approved an [**emergency declaration for Georgia**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-georgia-emergency-declaration-2/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) and a**[major disaster declaration for Florida](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-florida-disaster-declaration-2/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**. These moves grant FEMA and the Department of Homeland Security greater latitude to mobilize the equipment and resources necessary to assist in recovery efforts in the days and weeks ahead. **“We will do everything in our power** to help those in need,” President Trump said today. “And we will not rest or waver until the job is done and the recovery is complete.” **[Get up-to-date information on the federal response to Hurricane Michael](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.fema.gov/hurricane-michael).**
## A busy day at the White House
##
**Now 629 days since his Inauguration** , President Trump continues to fight hard for the American people day in and day out. To give you an inside look at just one day’s schedule at the White House:
* **Common sense reform for our music industry:** President Trump signed long-awaited legislation this morning to fix outdated American music laws. The Orrin G. Hatch–Bob Goodlatte Music Modernization Act has gained widespread support throughout the industry, expected to benefit songwriters, artists, and fans alike. Through a simplified licensing system, songwriters will finally be paid the royalties they deserve. [**Watch today’s signing ceremony**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DwtE22Q9_7U).
* **The Save our Seas Act of 2018:** Each year, countries the world over are responsible for dumping more than 8 million tons of garbage into our oceans. This trash and debris is not only harmful to the world’s marine life—it disrupts our fishermen and coastal economies, as well. President Trump signed legislation today to reauthorize and strengthen the Marine Debris Program.
* **Ending the scourge of human trafficking:** The Trump Administration is fighting to end the scourge of human trafficking, also known as modern-day slavery. Today, the President met with his Interagency Task Force to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons (PITF), a Cabinet-level entity consisting of 15 departments and agencies. The Administration is taking the fight to all fronts, and the results are piling up: Last year, the Department of Justice secured convictions against nearly 500 defendants, and the FBI dismantled 42 criminal enterprises engaged in child sex trafficking. [**Learn more about President Trump’s fight to end this horrific practice**. ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-taking-action-end-human-trafficking/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
* **Unprecedented access to journalists:** “President Trump, already the most media-accessible president in memory, is talking to journalists almost nonstop as his successes pile up ahead of the midterm elections,” Dave Boyer of _The Washington Times_ writes. [**See excerpts from the President’s phone interview this morning with Fox & Friends**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/highlights-president-trumps-interview-fox-friends/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

# Video of the day
#
President Trump hosted some special guests at the White House today. In addition to numerous artists joining the President for the signing of the Music Modernization Act, legendary Hall of Fame running back Jim Brown and rapper Kanye West visited the Oval Office to discuss prison reform and a range of other cultural and policy issues.**** [**Watch as President Trump hosts Jim Brown and Kanye West in the Oval Office.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.instagram.com/p/BozkPF2lomd/?utm_source=ig_share_sheet&igshid=1pfj22e36q2y9)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
President Donald J. Trump, joined by reporters, meets with Kanye West and NFL Hall of Famer Jim Brown in the Oval Office | **October 11, 2018**
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDExLjk2MTIwMTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMS45NjEyMDE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5Mzk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&109&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Josh
subject: quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
we don't have much timePeter,

This race is one of the top targets in the nation for Chuck Schumer. If we win here, Democrats have almost NO chance of taking back the Senate.

name: Doug Jones

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
October 15th is the voter registration deadline in Virginia, so it's now or never. To hold onto Tim's Senate seat and flip the House - well, that'll take some stepping up. ----------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

When I was elected last year, Senate Democrats were filled with hope and excitement, and so was I. I was excited to get to work with them, and they were eager to meet me.

When I got there, I already had a friend in Tim Kaine. We were both former civil rights attorneys who love our states and are willing to work across the aisle to get done what needs to be done for the common good.

**I will always step up to help Tim Kaine, and he tells me you will, too. Right now, he 's working towards a $50,000 goal to support his "Get Out the Vote" Fund, and he needs our help. By his team's calculations, he's $30,434 short. Can you pitch in, Derek?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f101f/3e0906/761a562f/3e378d50/2018635419/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181011_1_FR_DJ_Jones-Surrogate-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181011_1_FR_DJ_Jones-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181011_1_FR_DJ_Jones-Surrogate-LDND")

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

Team, Tom's far-right opponent, Wendy Rogers, is trying to win this race on blatant lies about Tom's record. She's been out there for weeks now, making misleading and, in many cases, outright false claims about Tom and what he stands for in her TV ads. _**Well, team, Rogers is at it again.**_ The Sedona _Red Rock News_ reports that Rogers repeated the same misleading attacks on Tom at a recent campaign event. She also doubled down on her pledge to be a rubber stamp for the Administration and the far-right (even promising to gut our health care system!). **Rogers is too extreme for Arizona, team, and we need to stop her.** [**Can you make a donation today to make sure we defeat Rogers and re-elect Tom in 26 days?**](http://action.tomohalleran. subject: the president attacked Bob last night -- here's how to fight back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d23/51dbcc2a/11f699a2/3aadd09/861019316/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

President Trump visited Pennsylvania _again_ last night, and it was exactly what we expected. He attacked Bob on stage for standing up to the most dangerous and divisive parts of his administration's agenda. Even worse, he straight up lied about Bob's record of fighting for all Pennsylvanians.

We're just 26 days out from Election Day, and there's another critical fundraising deadline around the corner. Between attacks from the GOP and the president himself, we have a lot of work to do to protect Bob in the final days of this campaign.

**_[I'm setting a goal of raising $75,000 completely online from grassroots donors like you in the next six days. Can you make a donation to help us reach that goal?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181011_fr2_v1s2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Hitting this number will help to protect our advertising budget going into these final weeks, to strengthen our get-out-the-vote program and to show the GOP we won't stand for their attacks on Bob. Together, I know that we can reach this goal, but it's going to take a lot of help from supporters like you.

clean_body: "" Team: President Trump visited Pennsylvania again last night, and it was exactly what we expected. He attacked Bob on stage for standing up to the most dangerous and divisive parts of his administration's agenda. Even worse, he straight up lied about Bob's record of fighting for all Pennsylvanians. We're just 26 days out from Election Day, and there's another critical fundraising deadline around the corner. Between attacks from the GOP and the president himself, we have a lot of work to do to protect Bob in the final days of this campaign. "" Hitting this number will help to protect our advertising budget going into these final weeks, to strengthen our get-out-the-vote program and to show the GOP we won't stand for their attacks on Bob. Together, I know that we can reach this goal, but it's going to take a lot of help from supporters like you. The president's visit shows that he is committed to flipping Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat this year -- rush a donation now to show that you're not going to let that happen: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks, Simone Simone Baer Finance Director Bob Casey for Senate | Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: TODAY: Make a plan to vote early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- Early voting in Ohio is now OPEN. That's right -- you can vote right now. [**If you haven 't already, make a plan to get to the polls.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe87/4462dc26/7db94592/20187501/2581804308/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181011b") We're seeing a lot of enthusiasm across the state as Ohioans make their voices heard, voting for an incredible slate of candidates up-and-down the ticket. Here were just a few highlights from yesterday, the first day of early voting: | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe87/4462dc26/7db94592/20187501/2581804308/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181011b") _In Cuyahoga County, the Shaw Marching Band was playing as Ohioans lined up to get to the polls._
---
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe87/4462dc26/7db94592/20187501/2581804308/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181011b") _Bailey was the first voter in Athens County!_
---
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe87/4462dc26/7db94592/20187501/2581804308/VEsC/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181011b") _In Ashland County, voters gathered before heading to the polls._
---
Early voting is so important. It's the best way to make sure your voice is heard. Think about it: Voting early means that if something comes up on Election Day and you can't make it to your polling place, you won't have to worry -- because your vote will already count.
As we all know from what we're seeing in Washington, the stakes are simply too high this year for your voice not to be heard.
[**So don 't wait -- join Ohioans all over the state in casting your vote early. Make a plan to vote now.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe87/4462dc26/7db94592/20187501/2581804308/VEsD/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181011b")
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe87/4462dc26/7db94592/20187500/2581804308/VEsA/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---

name: Take Back the Senate
subject: Joe Donnelly voted no. Now he’s under attack!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
**“Trump’s ugly attacks on Blasey Ford could save the Senate for Republicans. Really.”**

\-- _Washington Post_

**[Don’t let it happen, Peter>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2595484/15475070/-2115001353?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWZhOGMwMy1iNmNkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esN-8b8YsPXsB9lf7_Z5nFur72-W5wazghYS4xORR24=&refcode=20181011.i&amount=25)** Peter, Indiana’s Senate race -- **which could make the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the chamber** \-- is still a toss-up.

**But that may not be the case for long.**

After **Joe courageously voted against Brett Kavanaugh** , the GOP redoubled its efforts to defeat him -- and he was _already_ “one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators in the country.” **AND the NRA just launched an attack against him for voting no TOO!**

What’s worse, **their schemes could be working**. _The Hill_ reports that Mitch McConnell is saying the battle over Kavanaugh is providing a “major boost to Senate Republican candidates” -- candidates like Joe’s opponent Rep. Mike Braun, who called Dr. Ford’s accusation an “orchestration.”

**Peter, if we want to SAVE INDIANA’S DEMOCRATIC SEAT and help Democrats take the Senate, we need supporters like you to step up NOW.**

**[Will you pitch in to re-elect Joe and give us the momentum we need to WIN THE SENATE?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2595485/15475071/-2115001353?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWZhOGMwMy1iNmNkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esN-8b8YsPXsB9lf7_Z5nFur72-W5wazghYS4xORR24=&refcode=20181011.i&amount=25)**

Thanks for your support,

Friend,

I'll get right to it: a new poll was released showing 17% of Minnesota voters are still undecided on the governor's race. People are going to the polls, so we don't have any time to waste.

We ran the numbers for our weekly fundraising goal and we're a little short.

| | | Friend,

Martin's first debate of his re-election campaign is this Friday, and to show our support, we're hosting three watch parties across Albuquerque! Come watch Martin debate his opponents and cheer him on with your fellow Democrats!

**Event: NE Heights Debate Watch Party**
**When:** Friday, October 12, at 6:30 pm
**Where:** New Mexico for All NE Heights Office, 1605 Juan Tabo Blvd NE, Albuquerque, NM 87112
**[RSVP here->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b466/43d8135f/66db6a56/51004c6a/3286505340/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/dpnm/event/52094/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+RSVP+here+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EV_ABQ_181011_1_1&source=MH_EM_EV_ABQ_181011_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EV_ABQ_181011_1_1&ms=MH_EM_EV_ABQ_181011_1_1")**

name: KathyManning2018.com
subject: Update: Read ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Congressman Ted Budd is certainly worried -- he just launched his first attack ad against us.
| | Team -- We need you to urgently contribute to Kathy's campaign. Outside groups are rushing in to prop up Ted Budd and smear Kathy. We cannot let these attacks go unanswered. [**Will you step up and help us fight back?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427965/e3b7d3/5ec1ec4d/25555732/2226227745/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181011pm?refcode=kme181011pm_m") Thanks. _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kathy Manning
Subject: pundits, Budd, and special interest groups_ |
---
Three separate sources have upgraded this race to a "Toss Up."
Congressman Ted Budd is certainly worried -- he just launched his first attack ad against us.
And Budd's not alone -- **two national special interest groups just launched ads against us this week.**
_I've never been more convinced we're close to winning this race._
[**We're coming up against our final Mid-Month Deadline of the election. We've got four more days to reach our $50,000 goal. Will you rush in a contribution?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427965/e3b7d3/5ec1ec4d/25555732/2226227745/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181011pm?refcode=kme181011pm_m")
We can do this, I'm sure of it.
We've knocked on thousands of doors, made thousands of phone calls, and talked to thousands of people in this district. We've gone from way behind in the polls to up to four points ahead.
Families in this district are fed up of Congressman Budd and his special interest buddies and they're ready for change. We're so close to giving it to them.
[**Help us reach this Mid-Month goal by pitching in a few dollars, please.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427965/e3b7d3/5ec1ec4d/25555732/2226227745/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181011pm?refcode=kme181011pm_m")
Thank you.
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb338/24c69fd9/22f754ec4/18bb3abc/4090815538/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEV49N_digital_email_20181011_FMFLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEV49N_digital_email_20181011_FMFLastChance_inact")
---

Peter,

The midnight deadline for our Final Month Fund is just hours away.

We set an ambitious goal of raising $300,000 in just 3 days because time's running short to support the hundreds of pro-choice Democratic women we have running up and down the ballot.

I'm so proud that we've already raised $279,886 for the fund!

Every penny we raise goes toward helping our women win big in November, so we can't let up now -- can you make sure we hit our goal?

**Donate $3 to our Final Month Fund before midnight tonight:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fill-Final-Month-Fund](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb338/24c69fd9/22f754ec4/18bb3abd/4090815538/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181009_email_FinalMonthFund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFillFinalMonthFu&utm_campaign=WQEFEV49N_digital_email_20181011_FMFLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEV49N_digital_email_20181011_FMFLastChance_inact")**

I'm grateful for everything you do to help women win.

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb338/24c69fd9/22f754ec4/18bb3abe/4090815538/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181009_email_FinalMonthFund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFEV49N_digital_email_20181011_FMFLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEV49N_digital_email_20181011_FMFLastChance_inact")
